subject: Re: pool
body:
sylvia.. you are much prettier than these pictures,, I DON"T like them at all.. there is no character,, can you tell what you are thinking by just looking at the photo. Spend some time when you are in holland looking at the great photographer photos. patrick, antoine, gil,  they need to have personality not just lips eyes and hair.


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, July 20, 2007 9:13:18 AM
Subject: FW: pool


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: sylvia geersen [mailto:sylvia300985@hotmail.com] 
Sent: Friday, July 20, 2007 8:12 AM
To: hello@denisp.com; Lesley Groff; Ilona@maxmodel.nl; patriciagallicola@hotmail.com
Subject: FW: pool







From: "Blue Glue, Marie" <sales@blue-glue.com>
Reply-To: <sales@blue-glue.com>
To: "Sylvia Geersen" <sylvia300985@hotmail.com>
Subject: pool
Date: Fri, 20 Jul 2007 20:38:28 +0800


as I said, you need no photoshop !
this is when I was chasing you around the pool for more pics, while you were swimming. . . between 2 bikinis shoots.

Marie
I.B.D 

Jalan Sawira No. 1, Br. Anyar Kaja, Kerobokan, Kuta, BALI 80361  |  T : +62 361 844 59 56  |  F : +62 361 736 309 | sales@blue-glue.com
